calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-09-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-09-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Russell L. Goodrow, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Professional Collection Consultants.
No appearance by defendant Vanessa C. Alvarado.
John Brooks, Collection Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 6, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Professional Collection Consultants, and against defendant VANESSA C. ALVARADO as follows:

Damages/Principal - $2,022.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $641.00.
Costs - $220.00, for a total of $2,883.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2008 Set For Trial On Jun-09-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
